contexts.context: …XSLT 1.0 then 2.0. Did some presentations at <mark>conferences</mark>. I represented Microsoft on the XSLT WG,…
…their plans for their tutorial at the Declarative Amsterdam <mark>conference</mark> on Thursday afternoon, 6 November 2025.…
…MK: What feedback did you get at the <mark>conference</mark>?
…too am very impressed. I’d like to see <mark>conference</mark> papers and other explorations of this idea.
…; “someone unironically proposed an XSLT talk at the <mark>conference</mark>, has hell frozen over?”
